name: Buffalo Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Chill celery and Blue Cheese dressing if preparing with wings.
2. Preheat oven broiler or BBQ.
3. Trim off wing tips.
4. Separate wings into 2 sections.
5. Slowly melt butter in a large saucepan.
6. Add hot sauce and vinegar, then remove from heat.
7. Brush oil on both sides of wings using vegetable oil.
8. Place wings on a broiling rack.
9. Broil for 15-20 minutes.
10. Toss wings and sauce together.
Fat grams per serving: Approx. Cook Time: :20
Less fattening than the traditional deep-fried version.
